节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: TreeMap stores key-value (KV) pairs. Each key must be unique and have only one value. TreeMap is implemented using a red-black tree, which is a binary search tree where keys are stored in sorted order for efficient insertion and removal.
A constructor used to create a TreeMap object. comparator (Optional) User-defined comparison functions. firstValue (required) previous element. secondValue (required) next element.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The TreeMap's constructor cannot be directly invoked.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The type of parameters are invalid.

error_codes.description: The TreeMap's constructor cannot be directly invoked.
The type of parameters are invalid.

节点.功能描述: Gets the element number of the hashmap.
Returns whether the Map object contains elements
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The isEmpty method cannot be bound.

error_codes.description: The isEmpty method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Returns whether a key is contained in this map
注释信息: @param { K } key - key key need to determine whether to include the key

节点.功能描述: Returns whether a value is contained in this map

节点.功能描述: Executes the given callback function once for each real key in the map. It does not perform functions on deleted keys callbackFn (required) A function that accepts up to three arguments. The function to be called for each element. thisArg (Optional) The value to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called. If thisArg is omitted, undefined is used as the this value.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The forEach method cannot be bound.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The type of parameters are invalid.

error_codes.description: The forEach method cannot be bound.
The type of parameters are invalid.
